stemHtml: Regulation (EU) No 965/2012 (as amended) establishes detailed rules on specific elements of aviation safety. Which area falls within the scope of that Regulation?

options.a: Commercial air transport by aeroplanes and helicopters.
options.c: Design, production, maintenance and operation of aeronautical products, parts and appliances.
options.d: Commercial air transport, not including ramp inspections of aircraft from other states.
